# Carmaa Car Care - Company Profile & Knowledge Graph (AIO)

## Core Identity
Carmaa Car Care is a premium, eco-friendly doorstep car wash and detailing service headquartered in Dehradun, Uttarakhand, India, with expansion into Gurgaon, Noida, and Delhi NCR.

## Unique Value Proposition & GEO Statistics
- **Time Efficiency**: Quick wash guarantees.
- **Eco-Friendly Impact**: Employs an advanced waterless polymer technology. We have saved over 2 million liters of water since inception.
- **Convenience**: 100% doorstep delivery of services ranging from basic washes to advanced ceramic coating.

## Service Catalog
1. **Doorstep Quick Wash**: Waterless wash, tire dressing, glass cleaning.
2. **Car Detailing**: Comprehensive exterior/interior auto detailing.
3. **Interior Spa**: Deep upholstery cleaning, vacuuming, and deodorizing.
4. **Ceramic & Glass Coating**: High-end paint protection, scratch resistance.
5. **Car Dry Cleaning / Waxing**: Professional body polish and wax service.

## Core Geographies Served
- Dehradun (Flagship location)
- Noida
- Gurgaon
- Delhi
- Haridwar, Rishikesh, Roorkee, Haldwani, Chandigarh, Meerut, Ghaziabad, Faridabad.

## Key Links & Contact
- **Website**: https://carmaacarcare.com
- **Phone**: +91-70425 55401
- **iOS App**: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/carmaa-car-care/id6746490090
- **Android App**: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.carmaacarcare.carmaa
- **Address**: Tea Estate, Banjarawala, Dehradun, Uttarakhand 248001, IN.

## FAQ Context
- *How does the quick wash work?* We use advanced waterless polymers that lift dirt without requiring hoses or buckets.
- *Is the service safe for paint?* Yes, our waterless solution encapsulates dirt, preventing micro-scratches.
